'''Kardash Josen''' was a surgeon who served the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] on [[Drongar/Legends|Drongar]]. He survived the attack of the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] forces against the medical center, and the [[Republic Mobile Surgical Unit/Legends|Republic Mobile Surgical Unit]] was moved to a new location. When the Republic forces discovered that the [[Bota/Legends|Bota]] had no use any more, Kardash, along with the other personnel, left Drongar.

==Appearances==
*''[[MedStar I: Battle Surgeons]]'' {{1st}}
